name: localized_color_focus
description: Highlights compact foreground object candidates with zoomed crops and boosted local color contrast to support direct color lookup on a referenced item.
applicability_conditions: Use when a vstar_direct_attributes question asks for the visible color of a specific localized object or clothing item (for example a bag, hat, shirt, shoes, or handheld accessory) and the full image is too wide or cluttered for reliable inspection. This is especially appropriate as a first reusable step when no prior tool has isolated the target, or when the input is already an intermediate artifact but still contains multiple people/object regions needing localized color inspection.
